_doc: Arco machine — source of truth for Claude Atlas scope registry on the work machine. Edited by hand. Read by ~/.claude/bin/atlas-sync. See claude/ARCHITECTURE.md for full context. Paths use ~ (expanded to $HOME at runtime) so they work from both the Arco machine itself ($HOME=/Users/gabriel.gripp) and from the personal machine via SMB mount ($HOME=/Volumes/gabriel.gripp).

notes._note: Personal Obsidian vault — already cloned on Arco machine.

isaac._note: Cluster of team repos. Read-only. Sub-repos have their own .claude/ but Atlas does NOT recurse here. See ARCHITECTURE.md §10 (SHARED-DEBT).
